class.name: JiebaUTF8
class.brief_description: Imported UTF-8 dictionary text resource used by Godot-Jieba.
class.description: [JiebaUTF8] stores dictionary text normalized to UTF-8. It is produced by the Godot-Jieba dictionary importer for [code].utf8[/code] and [code].gbk[/code] files. This resource lets exported projects load dictionary text through Godot's resource system instead of relying on raw dictionary files being recognized directly.

method.name: get_source_data
method.description: Returns the optional original source bytes saved by the importer.

method.name: get_source_encoding
method.description: Returns the source encoding used during import, usually [code]UTF-8[/code] or [code]GBK[/code].

method.name: get_source_path
method.description: Returns the original source file path recorded during import.

method.name: get_utf8_data
method.description: Returns [member utf8_text] encoded as UTF-8 bytes.

method.name: get_utf8_text
method.description: Returns the dictionary text normalized to UTF-8.

method.name: set_source_data
method.description: Sets the optional original source bytes.

method.name: set_source_path
method.description: Sets the original source file path.

method.name: set_utf8_text
method.description: Sets the dictionary text normalized to UTF-8.

members.member: Optional original source bytes saved by the importer.
Source encoding used during import. The importer supports [code]UTF-8[/code] and [code]GBK[/code].
Original source file path recorded during import.
